title: To Gelett Burgess.
content:
I never saw a purple cow,
        You say you never saw one;
     But this I'll tell you anyhow,
        I know that I can draw one.
meaning:
"To Gelett Burgess." is a quintessential example of Edwin C. Ranck's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
